description_short: Split bills with custom tip, tax, and per-person breakdown
description_full: The fastest way to split any bill. Enter the total, set your tip percentage, add tax if needed, and instantly see what each person owes. Supports unequal splits for when someone ordered the lobster. Clean, ad-free, works offline. One tap, done.
features: Unequal splits (assign custom amounts per person)
Per-person breakdown with tip + tax included
Round up/down to nearest dollar option

screens.name: MainCalculator
screens.description: Single-screen app. Bill amount input at top, tip slider below, number of people stepper, then per-person result card at bottom. History accessible via sheet.
components: Bill amount text field (numeric keyboard, auto-focus on launch)
Tip percentage slider (0-50%, default 18%, shows dollar amount live)
Tax toggle + tax rate field (default off, configurable %)
Result card: total per person, tip per person, tax per person
History button (opens sheet with last 20 calculations)

aso.title: Tip Calculator Deluxe
aso.subtitle: Split Bills & Calculate Tips
aso.keywords: tip calculator,bill splitter,split bill,restaurant tip,gratuity,tip calc,bill split,check splitter,meal split,dining tip
aso.promotional_text: The fastest, cleanest way to split any bill. No ads, no subscriptions, just math.
